title: orchis incarnata subsp. integrata
intro: Orchis incarnata subsp. integrata, commonly known as the wild vanilla orchid or the whole purple orchid, is a rare and unique plant species that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis incarnata subsp. integrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
